content.en:
And just when Ye Tian used the Endless Yuan Dao to resist the power of this mountain, a half-step sevenfold ancestor looked at him in surprise, and they were all extremely shocked.

"Extreme Yuan Dao!"

They all thought it was incredible.

Although the treatment of the half-step sevenfold ancestor of the five top forces is very good, there are many treasures and treasures that can be used to comprehend the Yuan Dao, it is very easy to comprehend the Yuan Dao to the realm of Xiaocheng and Dacheng in the realm of the half-step sevenfold primordial ancestor, and if you are willing to spend endless years, you can also comprehend the Yuan Dao to the realm of perfection.

However, it took too long to comprehend the Yuan Dao to the Consummation Realm in the half-step Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor Realm, and it was not worth it.

After all, it is not cost-effective to improve the Yuan Dao realm in a half-step sevenfold ancestral realm, or to go to the Yuan Dao after breaking through to the sevenfold original ancestor realm, it is easier to go to the Yuan Dao!

For them, in the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm, they naturally did their best to improve their life level, who would want to spend endless years to improve the Yuan Dao realm!

Moreover, no matter how much they comprehended, they couldn't raise the Yuan Dao to the extreme realm!

Among the five major forces, there are only a handful of existences that can raise the Yuan Dao to the limit realm in the half-step sevenfold ancestor realm, and they are all those reincarnated eightfold ancestors.

However, if the Eightfold Origin Ancestor wants to be reincarnated, it is too difficult, and even the Ninefold Origin Ancestor will snatch it if it is a reincarnation treasure!

"This guy is the Dao Ancestor of the Nine-Fold Building, could it be a reincarnated Dao Ancestor, otherwise, how could he have realized the Yuan Dao to the extreme realm in the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm?"

A half-step sevenfold ancestor of the Ten Dao Mountains said curiously.

"It doesn't have to be the reincarnation of the Dao Ancestor, the reincarnated Dao Ancestor has a big advantage in the Yuan Dao Enlightenment, but he does not have a big advantage in the life level, and he is even in a weak position, and it is even more difficult for them to improve the life level. "

"This guy's life level is already very close to 9.9, maybe there is really hope to step into 9.9!"

"It is said that the reincarnated Dao Ancestor has no way to raise the life level to 9.9, unless he completely abandons everything in his previous life, even his memory, can he hope to completely get rid of the influence of the past. But if you throw away your memories, you may not be able to grow up, and you may die when you are weak, or you may not be able to become a cultivator!"

"Yes, so none of the Dao Ancestors who have abandoned all reincarnations at the moment have grown up!"

......

Deep in the mountains.

A Ninefold Dao Ancestor also noticed Ye Tian.

"Luohan Dao Ancestor, this is your half-step seven-fold ancestor of the Nine-Fold Building, in this realm, he has comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao to the extreme realm, there are some demons!

"I don't know, but it's unlikely that we'll be reincarnated as a Dao Ancestor, we can sense a trace of the shadow of the Reincarnation Arcana, and he hasn't used the shadow of the Reincarnation Arcana on his body, unless he was also a Ninefold Ancestor in his previous life, which can shield our perception. But we, the Ninefold Ancestors, didn't have FaLun reincarnation, and we didn't have that kind of reincarnation treasure. "

"That's right, it seems that you guys are lucky in the Nine Floors, this little guy really has a hope of reaching the life level of 9.9!"

"It's just hope, and even if you reach the 9.9 life level, you may not grow up in the future!"

After chatting for a while, these Ninefold Origin Ancestors stopped paying attention to Ye Tian.

Of course.

Ye Tian had already entered the list of the other four major forces, even if the Ninefold Ancestor would not deal with him, the top forces that had a bad relationship with the Ninefold Building might send someone to assassinate him one day!

......

Ye Tian also knew that he had exposed the Endless Yuan Dao of the Extreme Realm this time, which would definitely attract a lot of attention, and it was impossible to keep a low profile.

However, he is extremely eager to raise his life level to 9.9, so if he is exposed, he will be exposed!

After a long time, some half-step sevenfold ancestors with weak Yuan Dao realms felt that they had been affected, and they had no choice but to grit their teeth and leave here.

If they continue to stay here, their foundation will be affected, and maybe even the Nine Ancestors will not be able to help them solve their physical problems.

Of course, there are also eightfold ancestors and half-step nine-fold ancestors who can't withstand the influence of the mountain and come out from the inside.

After all, they are in a deeper position and have a greater impact.

At this time.

Ye Tian was not affected by anything, he still felt very relaxed.

Obviously, he can stay here for a long time.

In addition, Ye Tian also felt that his life level had improved a lot, but in the end, he definitely did not reach 9.9, because once he reached the 9.9 life level, he would feel it himself, it was the limit of the life level of the half-step sevenfold ancestor, and there would naturally be huge changes.

"The effect has weakened a little, it's better to move forward a little longer, I have the Endless Yuan Dao of the Extreme Realm, I should be able to withstand it!"

So, Ye Tian continued to move forward for a distance.

He stopped when he felt that the position was a little deeper.

The refining effect here is much better than that of the outermost outer, and of course he knows that he won't be able to stay here for a long time.

Another period of time has passed.

Ye Tian used the mysterious power of this mountain to raise his life level a lot, but he also felt that his body was a little unbearable.

At this time, he saw a Ninefold Ancestor come out of the deepest part of the mountain.

More than one!

A Ninefold Ancestor came out, and it seemed that something bad had happened.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian was grabbed by a big hand and directly taken out of the mountain.

The next moment.

This mysterious mountain has been sealed.

"Mountain riot, this is the end of this opportunity, you can't stay any longer, otherwise you will all fall!" revealed one of the Nine Ancestors.

The Dao ancestors who came here were all ontologies, and the clones they refined naturally did not need to raise their life level.

Therefore, once it falls here, it really falls.

Ye Tian didn't know what was going on in the depths of the mountain, but it was definitely not a good thing, so he wouldn't ask too much.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to return to the Guquan Xuanlou.

......

"Endless Dao Ancestor, how much has your life level improved?"

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor said with some expectation.

"Landlord, I haven't tested it yet, I don't know very well. "

Ye Tian said.

Immediately, the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor personally took Ye Tian to test the life level.

After a while, the life level came out.

【9.8】

At this moment, Ye Tian is really only one step away from 9.9!

"9.8!" The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor also gasped, his heart extremely shocked.

Although I don't know how much Ye Tian's 9.8 is from 9.9, it is very likely that it has just reached 9.8, and it may also be much more than the general 9.8, and it is infinitely close to 9.9.

But no matter what, Ye Tian has a great hope of raising his life level to 9.9.

"9.8!"

Ye Tian was also very satisfied with this result, he knew that he did not reach 9.9, so reaching 9.8 was his expectation.

As long as he goes further, he can raise the life level to the current limit, and in the future, he can break the boundary of life level 99 and step above the life level of 100.

And soon, the news that Ye Tian's life level had reached 9.8 reached the upper floors of the Nine-Story Building.

After a while, an order was given.

The Nine-Folded Building ordered Ye Tian to enter the Dead River Heavenly Tower, one of the Nine-Folded Towers, and there was a great opportunity that would be given to him, which was related to whether he could raise his life level to the level of 9.9.
